title: Regulatory Affairs Consultant
description:
WhiteLab è una delle maggiori realtà a livello nazionale nel settore Testing, l’unità operativa di Zola Predosa (BO) appartenente alla Business Unit Life Science si occupa di assesment di biocompatibilità dei dispostivi medici. Il Laboratorio ricerca una figura da inserire nel reparto consulenze in ambito Regolatorio Biomedicale (MDR 2017/745, FDA Guidance), Farmaceutico, Dispositivi Medici a base di sostanze, Diagnostici e Cosmetico.  

  

**Requisiti**  

Laurea scientifica, preferibilmente: CTF, Farmacia, Biotecnologie Mediche/Farmaceutiche, Biologia, Ingegneria Biomedica.  

Desiderata non vincolante: specializzazione in Tossicologia (Plus: iscrizione all'albo)  

Esperienza: minimo 1 anno, preferibilmente da 2 anni (valutiamo anche senza esperienza a seconda della preparazione scolastica o lavorativa in ambito affine)  

  

**Competenze:**  

Conoscenza norme ISO per la biocompatibilità (serie 1003, 18562\) MDR e narcatura CE; Capacità di redigere Piani BEP, BER, Valutazioni Tossicologiche, Gap Analysis, Razionali giustificativi  

Plus: Fascicoli tecnici, Analisi dei Rischi, Clinical Evaluation, Post Market Surveillance, Data Analysis e Data Mining;  

Conoscenza lingua inglese (scritto e parlato livello buono)

title: Process Engineer
description:
**Requistion ID**: 83084

  

Dentsply Sirona is the world’s largest manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies, with over a century of innovation and service to the dental industry and patients worldwide. Dentsply Sirona develops, manufactures, and markets a comprehensive solutions offering including dental and oral health products as well as other consumable medical devices under a strong portfolio of world class brands.

  

Dentsply Sirona’s products provide innovative, high\-quality, and effective solutions to advance patient care and deliver better and safer dental care. Dentsply Sirona’s headquarter is located in Charlotte, North Carolina. The company’s shares are listed in the United States on NASDAQ under the symbol XRAY. Visit www.dentsplysirona.com for more information about Dentsply Sirona and its products.

  

For our manufacturing site in **Badia Polesine**, we are looking for a:

 **Process Engineer**

  

The role will be responsible for the development, optimization, and validation of production processes, supporting manufacturing in troubleshooting activities and driving continuous improvement initiatives. The Process Engineer will also prepare process documentation (work instructions) and train new operators on the correct use of production lines.

 **Responsibilities**

* In support of the maintenance team, ensures the correct operation and efficiency of equipment in compliance with applicable Safety, Environmental, and Quality procedures
* Responsible for the validation of production processes (IQ/OQ/PQ), definition of process parameters, and drafting of operating instructions in accordance with industry standards (e.g. ISO 13485 for medical devices)
* Monitors process stability and manages deviations
* Delivers technical training to new operators on the management of 3D printing lines, post‑processing, and quality control, periodically assessing acquired skills and providing continuous on‑the‑job support
* Manages the commissioning and testing of equipment, organizing Factory Acceptance Tests (FAT) and Site Acceptance Tests (SAT), and overseeing start‑up, calibration, and optimization of control logic
* Provides technical support to Production and Engineering for process analysis and problem solving (troubleshooting)
* Defines process KPIs and performs data analysis to improve efficiency, quality, and reduce scrap
* Implements Lean/Kaizen methodologies to improve productivity and ergonomics
* Participates in cross‑functional teams for new projects related to the introduction of new 3D printing and post‑processing technologies
* Coordinates external suppliers and system integrators during on‑site activities and ensures that all required technical documentation (drawings, manuals, declarations of conformity) is properly prepared and filed
* Supports the QAS Manager (Quality, Environment \& Safety Manager) in managing relationships with regulatory and certification bodies

 **Skills \& Qualifications**

* **Education:** Degree in Materials Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, or equivalent
* **Experience:** At least 3 years in a similar role
* Knowledge of resin‑based 3D printing processes (SLA, DLP, or similar)
* Data analysis skills (Excel, Minitab, or equivalent software)
* Knowledge of Lean Manufacturing techniques (5S, SMED, VSM) and Statistical Process Control (SPC)
* Experience with Process Failure Mode and Effects Analysis (PFMEA)
* Technical drawing skills (reading P\&ID diagrams, electrical schematics, automation layouts)
* Knowledge of medical device regulations (ISO 13485, cGMP) – preferred
* Fluent Italian and good command of technical English
* Flexibility: ability to adapt to different contexts and collaborate effectively with colleagues and managers
* Active participation in continuous improvement initiatives
* Strong problem‑solving mindset
* High level of accuracy, analytical approach, and strong quality orientation

 **Equal Opportunity Employer:** Dentsply Sirona is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will be considered without unlawful discrimination or regard for race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, sexual or gender identity, national or ethnic origin, age, marital status, disability, genetic factors, military and veteran status, or any other characteristics protected by applicable local law.

**Eligibility:** All successful applicants must be eligible to work in the country the position is based.

**Assistance:** If you need assistance with completing the online application due to a disability, please send an accommodation request to accommodationrequest@dentsplysirona.com.

**Agencies:** Please note that Dentsply Sirona does not accept or respond to unsolicited requests or applications submitted by Recruitment Agencies/ Search Firms.

**Notice on Fraudulent Job Offers:** Unfortunately, we are aware of third parties that pretend to represent our company offering unauthorized employment opportunities. If you think a fraudulent source is offering you a job, please have a look at the following information: careers.dentsplysirona.com.

title: Operatore / Operatrice telefonica
description:
Stiamo selezionando un **operatore / operatrice telefonica** che si occupi di:

* Contattare potenziali clienti
* Presentare in modo chiaro i nostri servizi
* Fissare appuntamenti qualificati per i nostri consulenti

I servizi riguardano:

* Consulenza multiutility (energia elettrica e gas)
* Efficienza energetica
* Telecomunicazioni

**Cosa ti offriamo davvero**

Entrando in CONSULING AND SOLUTION SRL, non inizi solo un lavoro…  
inizi un **percorso concreto**.

* **Contratto iniziale di 3 mesi**, pensato per valorizzare le tue capacità
* **Inserimento stabile e continuativo** per chi dimostra impegno e risultati
* Formazione pratica e supporto costante
* Ambiente professionale, organizzato e orientato alla crescita
* Sistema di lavoro già strutturato

Se cerchi stabilità, qui puoi costruirla.

**Chi stiamo cercando**

Una persona che:

* Comunica con sicurezza e naturalezza
* È determinata a raggiungere obiettivi concreti
* Ha voglia di imparare e migliorarsi ogni giorno
* Sa ascoltare e guidare la conversazione

**Il tuo obiettivo**

Immagina di:

* Parlare con clienti realmente interessati
* Fissare appuntamenti di valore
* Vedere i tuoi risultati crescere ogni settimana
* Trasformare un’opportunità iniziale in un lavoro stabile

Questo è esattamente ciò che vogliamo costruire insieme.

**Candidati ora**

Invia il tuo CV tramite Indeed o via email a: *info@consultingandsolution.it*

I candidati selezionati verranno contattati rapidamente.

Contratto di lavoro: Part\-time, Tempo determinato  
Durata contratto: 3 mesi

Retribuzione: a partire da €600,00 al mese

Ore previste: 20 a settimana

Benefit:

* Buoni pasto
* Parcheggio libero

Sede di lavoro: Di persona

title: VENDITORE CON ESPERIENZA - FISSO + PROVVIGIONI
description:
*Se ami vendere, concludere contratti, costruire offerte irresistibili, diventa ambasciatore di tecnologia e innovazione insieme a noi,e porta i nostri software nelle migliori agenzie immobiliari italiane!*

Ti dimenticherai che si tratta di un lavoro e ogni appuntamento ti sembrerà un game da vincere.

Sarai orgoglioso, entusiasta e coinvolto da ciò che proponi, al punto che ti sembrerà assurdo quando un cliente deciderà di lasciarsi sfuggire l’opportunità.

*Abbiamo tra le pipeline di vendita più performanti del nostro settore.*

La vendita media è di **34 giorni**, la più breve in **1\*, la più lunga in** 420\*.

Cosa significano questi numeri?

Che l’affare si conclude molto velocemente, spesso nei primi giorni dalla nostra offerta.

Seguendo i nostri protocolli, è possibile arrivare a gestire in modo strutturato **6–10 vendite al mese**, con guadagni che mediamente si collocano tra **4\.500€ e 7\.000€ mensili**.

E siamo strutturati per convertire anche nel lungo periodo.

La reputazione della nostra azienda è una perla rara nel settore immobiliaree renderà estremamente semplice distinguerti dalle offerte competitor.

**Chi cerchiamo?**

Cerchiamo più di un semplice venditore.Vogliamo un commerciale che diventi il centro del nostro business, volto dell’azienda e riferimento del mercato.

Attualmente il nostro reparto commerciale conta 4 persone in sede distaccata a Roma. Il tuo ruolo invece sarà in sede e rivestirà una posizione di maggiore autorità.

**Come farai?**

Gestirai le richieste in entrata provenienti dal marketing, svilupperai il pacchetto clienti e svolgerai ricerca attiva per aumentare le opportunità di vendita.

I tuoi feedback e le tue opinioni, direttamente dal mercato, contribuiranno a migliorare i prodotti e i servizi, oltre che al lancio di nuovi.

**Da dove parti oggi?**

Comincerai il tuo percorso in azienda con:

* ufficio dedicato
* formazione sui processi e sul prodotto

Riceverai un pacchetto di **500 possibili clienti già qualificati** dall’azienda.

Compenso:

* **1\.000€ al mese**
* **\+15% di provvigioni sulle vendite eseguite**

**A chi è adatto?**

Questo percorso è per te se:

* Hai già ricoperto ruoli di vendita e vuoi passare dalla parte dei buoni del business
* Per te vendere è gioco e divertimento, e chiudere trattative è il lavoro più bello del mondo
* Arrivi in ufficio con passione ed entusiasmo e vivi come tua la mission aziendale

**Requisiti obbligatori**

* Partita Iva

Contratto di lavoro: Tempo pieno

Retribuzione: €4\.500,00 \- €7\.000,00 al mese

Benefit:

* Computer aziendale
* Formazione professionale
* Orario flessibile

Sede di lavoro: Di persona

title: MANOVALE EDILE SPECIALIZZATO
description:
La nostra azienda di costruzioni sta crescendo rapidamente e stiamo attualmente cercando un MANOVALE EDILE SPECIALIZZATO per entrare a far parte del nostro team. In questa posizione il lavoratore, affiancato da un muratore specializzato, si occuperà di tutti gli aspetti che competono alla mansione su cantieri in edifici commerciali e residenziali.

Offriamo una retribuzione competitiva, un pacchetto completo di prestazioni e un lavoro sistematico e a lungo termine dopo un primo periodo. Orario di lavoro 7\.30 \- 16\.30\.

Il ruolo richiede buona manualità, precisione e capacità di lavorare in squadra.

E' richiesta la Patente B.

Le persone esperte e qualificate sono incoraggiate a presentare la propria candidatura.

Contratto di lavoro: Tempo pieno, Tempo determinato  
Durata contratto: 3 mesi

Retribuzione: a partire da €1\.600,00 al mese

Esperienza:

* MANOVALE MURATORE: 2 anni (Preferenziale)

title: Auditor II Retail
description:
As a Retail Auditor, you will help strengthen the integrity and performance of our Italian operations by conducting risk‑focused operational, financial, and compliance audits. You will assess adherence to corporate standards and regulatory requirements, ensuring consistency, accountability, and continuous improvement across our retail and hospitality network.


In this role, you’ll apply strong analytical thinking and professional curiosity to evaluate systems and processes, identify areas of opportunity, and provide clear, actionable recommendations. You will contribute directly to safeguarding company assets and enhancing operational excellence within a complex, global organisation.


Please apply by sending us your CV in English.


  
* Responsibilities: Conduct audits across retail and hospitality locations in Italy.
* Assess the design and effectiveness of internal controls in line with corporate audit methodologies and regulatory requirements.
* Perform risk assessments to identify control gaps, process inefficiencies, and areas of exposure.
* Validate compliance with Italian legislation, including labour regulations, health and safety standards, and industry‑specific requirements.
* Prepare clear and comprehensive audit reports outlining findings, root causes, and recommended corrective actions.
* Maintain accurate and complete audit documentation in accordance with corporate standards.
* Monitor and track remediation activities to ensure timely resolution of audit issues.
* Present audit results to local and regional leadership when required.
* Provide guidance and training on compliance expectations and best practices.
* Support regional and global audit initiatives, including process harmonisation and continuous improvement projects.

  
* Qualifications: Technical/scientific degree (e.g., Food Science, Biology, Chemistry, Engineering, Public Health) paired with recognised audit and/or safety certifications.
* Two years of experience minimum in internal audit, external audit, compliance, or operational roles within retail, hospitality, FMCG, or similar industries.
* Strong understanding of internal control frameworks and audit methodologies.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office; familiarity with audit management systems is an advantage.
* Knowledge of Italian regulatory requirements applicable to retail and hospitality operations.
* Strong analytical, investigative, and problem‑solving skills.
* Excellent communication skills in English and Italian.
* Ability to manage multiple priorities and work independently with minimal supervision.
* Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to influence stakeholders across organisational levels.
* High degree of integrity, confidentiality, and professional ethics.

*Notice to Agency and Search Firm Representatives: Please note that NSF is not accepting unsolicited resumes from agencies and search firms for this role. Resumes submitted to an NSF employee by a third\-party agency without a valid written and signed search agreement between NSF and said third\-party agency will become the sole property of NSF. No fee will be paid if a candidate is hired as a result of an unsolicited agency or search firm referral. Thank you.*

title: Hydraulic & Transmission Engineer
description:
Job ID
45685
Date
9 April 2026
Job Family
* Development

Type of contract
* Permanent


, Permanent
**Why work for Manitou Group?**

  



Manitou is purposefully committed to you, its people. Based on a “One United Team” focus, we internationally cultivate our purpose\-driven and agile work environment. As an equal opportunity employer, we cultivate, build and elevate our more than 6000 employees and their diversity across more than 30 countries we operate in. There are 6 main plants with locations in France, the USA, India, Italy and more than 30 subsidiaries all around the world.

  



Are you looking for a new opportunity? Join us to be part of our continuous success.


**Role Responsibilities**



The candidate will support the R\&D Department in the following phases:



Schematic and Drawing Development: Creation of complex hydraulic schematics and technical drawings based on project specifications.



Component Selection and Parameterization: Analysis of supplier datasheets to select and configure valves, pumps, cylinders, and actuators according to required performance.



Technical Validation: Verification of sub\-components and assemblies received from suppliers to ensure compliance with drawings and corporate standards.



Design Modeling: Utilizing models (including simplified versions) to simulate the behavior of the designed system and validate engineering choices (e.g., pressure drop calculations, cycle times).



Mechatronic Integration: Collaborating on the definition of interfaces between the hydraulic system and the mechanical/electronic parts of the machine.



Project Documentation: Drafting Bills of Materials (BOM), technical reports, and supporting documentation for product development.



Technical Liaison: Collaborating with the Purchasing Department and suppliers to source 2D/3D models and technical specifications, and with Group departments to ensure alignment with design standards.

  


**Technical Skills**



Technical Drawing and CAD: Excellent ability to read and draft hydraulic schematics (ISO symbology) and proficiency in CAD software (2D and/or 3D).



Fluid Power Calculation: Mastery of basic hydraulic concepts (flow rates, pressures, power, duct sizing).



Component Knowledge: Familiarity with the commercial hydraulic component market (directional control valves, power units, filters).



Calculation Tools: Proficiency in Excel or specific software for sizing and rapid performance verification of circuits.

  


**Soft Skills**  

Solution\-Oriented: Ability to solve integration problems between different components.



Collaborative Attitude: Essential for mediating between supplier requirements and internal project constraints.



Technical Precision: Rigor in managing specifications and verifying technical data.

  


**Role Requirements**  

Academic Background: Degree in Mechanical, Mechatronic, or Energy Engineering (with a focus on fluid dynamics or automation).



Languages: Good knowledge of English (written and spoken) for communication at the Group level.

  





**What does MANITOU Group offer?** *Above local legal requirements, of course*



In addition to standard national regulatory and contractual conditions, we provide:



Welfare and Wellbeing  

Our company is deeply convinced that individual well\-being is the foundation of a peaceful and productive work environment. For this reason, beyond the standard classification and salary package, we offer a corporate Welfare and Wellbeing system that exceeds contractual obligations, placing the individual and their private life at the center. This commitment translates into a wide range of initiatives aimed at improving daily quality of life and supporting a healthy work\-life balance.



Welfare Portal: Every employee has access to a dedicated platform to manage their annual budget, selecting from various available welfare options based on personal preference.



Health and Discounted Purchasing: We promote health and access to quality goods through dedicated corporate agreements, including partnerships with pharmacies and local farms for organic, “zero\-km” products. Furthermore, we support prevention by providing employees with a package of paid hours for medical appointments.



Social and Environmental Initiatives (CSR): In line with our Corporate Social Responsibility values, we encourage participation in volunteer projects and actively support our community. Additionally, to reduce our environmental impact, we promote carpooling among employees.



Sports Activities: To foster integration and physical well\-being, the company actively supports the formation of internal sports teams and recreational activities.



Supplementary Pension Scheme: With the goal of encouraging a more secure financial future, starting January 1, 2026, the company provides a contribution to the COMETA fund equal to 3% of the contractual minimums for workers under the age of 35\.



Training and Development: We guarantee constant and flexible access to skill updates through our Group digital catalog, “Digital Campus.” This training platform offers courses and resources to support continuous professional development in line with both company and individual needs.
company_description: Manitou Group, a world leader in rough-terrain handling, invents, produces, distributes and services material for construction, agriculture and industries.

title: TEMPORARY RISK & CHANGE MANAGER – CAPITAL PROJECTS (PHARMA / LIFE SCIENCES)
